item.title: Trump starved Cuba of oil to make them scream. Cuba responded by going solar with China and pulling off one of the fastest clean energy transitions on the planet. The blockade is really working out fucking great.
item.description: Trump's oil blockade was supposed to make Cuba's economy SCREAM. Instead, Chinese solar exports to Cuba rocketed from $3 million to $117 million in two years, and Cuba just pulled off one of the fastest solar transitions on the planet. The plan is working — CHINA'S plan. ☀️ Cuba's solar share jumped from 5.8% to over 20% in a SINGLE YEAR. 92 solar parks by 2028. Two gigawatts. Enough to power 1.5 million homes. America starved them of oil and accidentally handed Beijing the most powerful goodwill campaign in Latin American history. CONGRATU-FUCKING-LATIONS. China's ambassador literally stood at a podium in Havana and said "Latin America is not the backyard of any country." On a microphone. To the press. While Trump was threatening to TAKE Cuba. This is not a good look. This is the geopolitical equivalent of tripping over your own dick on live television. America spent 60+ years trying to break Cuba with an embargo. Trump cranked it to maximum. Cuba responded by going SOLAR with China's help and telling the fossil fuel era to go fuck itself. You cannot make this up. ⚡ #Cuba #SolarRevolution #CubaBlockade #TrumpForeignPolicy #ChinaCuba #CleanEnergy #EmbargoBrainrot #GeopoliticalOwnGoal https://www.ctvnews.ca/world/article/as-the-us-starves-it-of-oil-cuba-is-pulling-off-one-of-the-fastest-solar-revolutions-on-the-planet-with-chinas-help/
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

Remember that not everything is as bleak as it seems to be, and you can have a great positive impact on those around you! I do reviews as a hobby and this week I tackled a new sci-fi game for a change. Pragmata! If you're curious about it, check the link https://youtu.be/zGxfAruU1n4

item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: She’s gone one year today, my world is dark
item.description: One year ago today, Teresa left this world darker and heaven gained an angel. My angel. My wife. My love. How do you tell the world how wonderful and beautiful Teresa was? 34 years together was not enough. Every day I think of her and miss her so terribly sometimes my heart can’t stand it. I know she had to go, but I would give anything to have her whole and healthy by my side, to hear her laugh and see her bounce the granddaughter she never got to meet. I love you Teresa, with all my heart and soul.
item.dc:creator: reallefty

item.description: I don’t have much more to say on this except that my head hurts. . . EDIT: Not wanting to be pregnant is a perfectly valid reason to get an abortion. I listed these complications to combat a dangerous and life-threatening side effect of anti-abortion propaganda: the illusion that you only have to abort a pregnancy if you don’t want to be pregnant. Due to so much misinformation on the internet, abortion is seen purely as a choice. You should have the option to decide whether to be pregnant or not, but there are also times when you have no choice BUT to terminate if you want to live. I am very worried about the risk of people hanging onto fatal pregnancies because they don’t understand that it’s physically not viable, because anti-abortion propaganda has said that this dilemma doesn’t exist. The people who want to take away the right to choose are backing those who have no choice but to terminate into a six feet hole. Not all abortions are done by choice, unless you present a medically life-or-death situation as something that can be “opted out of” just by wanting a pregnancy. . . SOURCES CITED Ectopic Pregnancy: https://www.mayoclinic.org/diseases-conditions/ectopic-pregnancy/symptoms-causes/syc-20372088 Cancer and Pregnancy: https://www.cancer.org/cancer/managing-cancer/making-treatment-decisions/cancer-during-pregnancy.html Medical Reasons for Abortion: https://edhub.ama-assn.org/jn-learning/video-player/18733794 Medical Reasons for Late-Term Abortion: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/11/12/fact-check-are-late-term-abortions-ever-medically-necessary Hyperemesis Gravidarum: https://www.hyperemesis.org/who-we-help/family-friends/about-hg-for-family-friends/ Retained Placenta Treatments: https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diseases/21512-retained-products-of-conception Fetal Death Health Risks: https://health.ucdavis.edu/obgyn/specialties/family-planning/early-pregnancy-miscarriage/second-trimester-miscarriage
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: GovBrief Today #467
item.description: ICE agents are walking around with a target list of 20 million people on their phones. Palantir compiled the list, which is roughly the number of undocumented people living in the United States. When agents conduct an immigration raid, the app displays the names of other people who may be nearby, so one arrest can turn into several. That kind of power doesn't disappear when a new president takes office. It just changes hands. In a country where being on ICE's list is enough to get detained without cause, this list cannot exist. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell your representatives to kill the Palantir contract. I've emailed 7,371 stories over 467 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss pictures, data, and easy-click links on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260512-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/tenn-dems [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may12 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/makary-resign [4] https://go.govbrief.today/blm-conservation [5] https://go.govbrief.today/mo-sc-maps [6] https://go.govbrief.today/press-subpoenas [7] https://go.govbrief.today/golden-dome-cbo [8] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-settlements [9] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-payment-paused [10] https://go.govbrief.today/key-bridge-charges [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-venturella [12] https://go.govbrief.today/dr-deportees [13] https://go.govbrief.today/colorado-ice [14] https://go.govbrief.today/palantir-list [15] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-obama-arrest [16] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-irs-trump [17] https://go.govbrief.today/video-games-mall Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1686 (poor twice)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. (Georgian egg bread)
Imagine this in a Darth Vader voice.
Mongol princess
I love how this meme is a month old almost and hasn't aged a damn bit.
I've always avoided dating one before but with this perspective.... I'd be willing to try it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [beep] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
